## Checklist
- [ ] CI is green.
- [ ] Artifacts uploaded.
- [ ] App launches if manually tested.
- [ ] `processBlock` unchanged or explained.
- [ ] Audio pass-through unchanged.
- [ ] New `.cpp` files added to `mixpulse/CMakeLists.txt`.
- [ ] `createPluginFilter` still exists exactly once.
- [ ] No video export / NDI / Spout / Syphon / shader SDK unless explicitly requested.
- [ ] WaveFrame user-facing name preserved.
- [ ] MixPulse internal codename preserved.
- [ ] Screenshots/GIFs added if UI changed.
- [ ] Manual tests listed.
